tags.description: Historical usage: The third oldest naval dry dock in the U.S.
tags.name: Dry Dock 1

tags.description: Known as the “Hoodoo Dock,” this basin was notorious for the difficult problems, delays and deaths that occurred during construction. Quicksand beds plagued construction firms that took the job, killing 20 men and injuring around 400 others.
